zh.Southampton, Hampshire, England: 英國英格蘭哈普爾素坦普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lydia Annesley於1515年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親William Robert Annesley II40歲，母親Mabellia English36歲。她和Thomas Ayres至少有1個女兒。她去世於1540年在她的家鄉享年25歲。

zh-hans.Southampton, Hampshire, England: 英国英格兰哈普爾素坦普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lydia Annesley于1515年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲William Robert Annesley II40岁，母亲Mabellia English36岁。她和Thomas Ayres至少有1个女儿。她去世于1540年在她的家乡享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Annesley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ansley
meanings: habitational name from such places as Ansley in Warwickshire or Annesley in Nottinghamshire. The former is named with Old English ānsetl ‘hermitage’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’; the latter with an Old English personal name An (‘the solitary one’) + lēah. In North America, the surname may in some cases also be an altered form of Scottish Ainslie . Compare Ainsley .

nameMeanings.name: Lydia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Greek origin, meaning ‘woman from Lydia’, an area of Asia Minor. The name is borne in the Bible by a woman of Thyatira who was converted by St Paul and who entertained him in her house (Acts 16:14–15, 40). It has enjoyed steady popularity in the English-speaking world since the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Lydia Annesley was born in 1515, in England, United Kingdom, her father, William Robert Annesley II, was 40 and her mother, Mabellia English, was 36. She had at least 1 daughter with Thomas Ayres. She died in 1540, in her hometown, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lydia Annesley est née en 1515, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Robert Annesley II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mabellia English, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Thomas Ayres. Elle est décédée en 1540, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lydia Annesley 1515 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Robert Annesley II 40 und ihre Mutter Mabellia English 36. Sie hatte mit Thomas Ayres mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1540 im Alter von 25 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Annesley è nata il nel 1515 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Robert Annesley II, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Mabellia English, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Thomas Ayres. Morì nel 1540, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lydia Annesleyが1515年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父William Robert Annesley IIは40歳，母Mabellia Englishは36歳であった。彼女はThomas Ayresとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1540年に故郷で25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lydia Annesley(이)가 1515년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Robert Annesley II(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabellia English(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Ayres(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 그녀의 고향에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Southampton, Hampshire, England: Southampton, Hāmtūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Annesley nasceu em 1515, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Robert Annesley II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mabellia English, tinha 36 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Thomas Ayres. Ela faleceu em 1540, em sua cidade natal, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lydia Annesley родилась в 1515 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Robert Annesley II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabellia English, 36. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Thomas Ayres. Она умерла в 1540 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lydia Annesley nació en 1515, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Robert Annesley II, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mabellia English, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Thomas Ayres. Murió en 1540, en su pueblo, a la edad de 25 años.
